name: Qualify AI
desc: AI mock interview platform generating 15 adaptive questions from resumes or candidate profiles. Google OAuth, JWT auth, Razorpay credit-based subscriptions, and LLM-based response evaluation with downloadable interview reports.

name: AgriSight
desc: AI-powered crop recommendation system for UP farmers, trained on soil and weather data. Integrates Groq LLaMA3 for real-time farming advice, WeatherAPI for forecasts, and a BotPress chatbot for query resolution.

name: NextTask
desc: Full-stack Kanban task manager built with React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and JWT authentication. Features drag-and-drop task management, an analytics dashboard, and a responsive UI.
